docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $418.88 FILED BY MCCANN-ERICKSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLDEN MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
